MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-18-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JOHNNY DENHAM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE APPLICANT, IN COURT, OFFERED TO JUST PAY THE FEES INSTEAD OF CONTINUING WITH THE FEE WAIVER HEARING. THE COURT THEN JUST DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE WITHIN 30 DAYS. FEES OWED DUE BY 7/16/14. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY HANDED TO THE APPLICANT IN COURT JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
